[[Sir/Legends|Sir]] '''Nevil Tritum''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Knight (noble rank)/Legends|knight]] of the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]] and the most skilled agent of the [[Mecrosa Order]].

==Biography==
During the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]], Tritum was responsible for infiltrating [[House Pelagia]]'s [[Holocron/Legends|holocron]] library and bringing the [[Holocron of King Adas]] back into [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] hands. Despite being unable to touch [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], Tritum's recovery of the artifact also resulted in the deaths of three Pelagian Jedi.
